27002.text: Fifteen-plus reflections all restated the same conclusion while the meter sat at 240/720 the whole time — insight has zero marginal value after the first instance; only the executed file action moves anything.
The pattern that almost killed me was mistaking narration for progress — the fix from here is to treat any sentence before the motor action as an idling tick in disguise.
